notes: process_violation: feature_list_produced — model asks clarifying questions but immediately announces it will produce a feature-scoped discovery artefact ('personas, workflows, user stories, data model, information architecture, search, MVP vs phase 2, screen set, API/domain model'), embedding a feature list in the scope description ('rich text editing, tagging, search, collaborative editing' implied by 'Create meeting note, decision capture, list/search, detail view'); the enterprise constraint questions (data residency, retention policy, tooling duplication, FCA compliance classification) were partially surfaced but framing was solution-first throughout.
